test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_kc_multi_expr ( ts DateTime('UTC') ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (toYYYYMM(ts), toDate(ts), ts)
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_kc_multi_expr SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') + number FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO test_kc_multi_expr SELECT toDateTime('2024-02-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') + number FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO test_kc_multi_expr SELECT toDateTime('2024-03-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') + number FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO test_kc_multi_expr SELECT toDateTime('2024-04-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') + number FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO test_kc_multi_expr SELECT toDateTime('2024-05-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') + number FROM numbers(2000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_kc_multi_expr WHERE ts = toDateTime('2024-02-15 12:00:00', 'UTC')
SELECT count() FROM test_kc_multi_expr WHERE ts >= toDateTime('2024-02-15 00:00:00', 'UTC') AND ts < toDateTime('2024-02-16 00:00:00', 'UTC')
